meta.title: Uha — Subscription Manager for iOS
meta.description: The subscription tracker that isn't a subscription. Pay once. No recurring charges, ever. Track all your subscriptions on iOS with renewal alerts, iCloud backup, and a timeline of past and upcoming charges. All data stays on your device. Like a bank feed for your subscriptions.
meta.short_description: The subscription tracker that isn't a subscription. Pay once. No recurring charges, ever.

jsonld.unlimited_tier: Unlimited subscriptions, all currencies, iCloud sync, backup restoration, 10-year timeline, all future premium features
